results.title: AI will lead to labour shortages, Bezos says in optimistic talk
results.description: PARIS (Reuters) — Artificial Intelligence will lead to labour shortages, not the replacement of humans, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos predicted in a highly optimistic appearance at the VivaTech technology conference in Paris on Wednesday. The post AI will lead to labour shortages, Bezos says in optimistic talk appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: Namo Bharat rail to be extended from Meerut, Delhi to Rishikesh travel time reduced by 3 hours
results.description: Namo Bharat, India's semi-high-speed regional rail service, will go further upto Rishikesh in Uttarakhand from Uttar Pradesh's Meerut. The 82-km-long corridor, which will now be extended by another 150 km to Lakshman Jhula in Rishikesh.

results.title: Oxford PV achieves 25.6% efficiency for perovskite-silicon tandem module based on shingled design
results.description: Perovskite solar module manufacturer Oxford PV announced it achieved a power conversion efficiency of 25.6% for a perovskite-silicon tandem solar module relying on a shingled architecture developed...
